syntax_5342.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5342.title: Packet Fields
syntax_5342.description: Get all packet fields, can't be set

en: Get all packet fields, can't be set
Return all available ProtocolLib packettypes

syntax_5340.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5340.title: Packet Meta
syntax_5340.description:
Get or set a packet meta
Meta are extra-datas that can be added to a packet

en:
Get or set a packet meta
Meta are extra-datas that can be added to a packet

syntax_5344.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5344.title: Number As Array
syntax_5344.description:
Convert %numbers% to int/float/long/double/short/byte array
Support conversion to primitive array

en:
Convert %numbers% to int/float/long/double/short/byte array
Support conversion to primitive array

syntax_5341.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5341.title: Packet Fields Classes
syntax_5341.description:
Get all fields's classes of a packet.
This is not intended to be use on your final code,
it's only to help you to know what is inside a packet

en:
Get all fields's classes of a packet.
This is not intended to be use on your final code,
it's only to help you to know what is inside a packet

syntax_5336.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5336.title: Receive Packet
syntax_5336.description: Makes the server simulate receiving the specified packet(s) from the specified player(s)
syntax_5336.syntax_pattern:
rec(ei|ie)ve packet[s] %packets% from %players% [without calling event]
rec(ei|ie)ve %players% packet[s] %packets% [without calling event]

en: Makes the server simulate receiving the specified packet(s) from the specified player(s)

syntax_5338.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5338.title: Packet Update Entity
syntax_5338.description: Force the update of an entity to a specific player(s)

en: Force the update of an entity to a specific player(s)

syntax_5337.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5337.title: Send Packet
syntax_5337.description: Sends the specified packet(s) to the specified player(s).
syntax_5337.syntax_pattern:
(dispatch|send) packet[s] %packets% to %players% [without calling event]
(dispatch|send) %players% packet[s] %packets% [without calling event]

en: Sends the specified packet(s) to the specified player(s).

syntax_6078.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6078.title: New Packet
syntax_6078.description: Create a new packet from a ProtocolLib's packettype

en: Create a new packet from a ProtocolLib's packettype

syntax_6079.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6079.title: Entity From ID
syntax_6079.description: Get the entity related to his ID in specified world

en: Get the entity related to his ID in specified world

syntax_6080.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6080.title: Enum
syntax_6080.description: Get an Enum from a class
syntax_6080.syntax_pattern:
enum %string% from class %string%
enum %string% from nms class %string%
enum %string% from class of %object%

en: Get an Enum from a class

syntax_6082.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6082.title: Clone of Packet
syntax_6082.description: Get a full copy (=deep) or a fast copy (=shallow) of a packet

en: Get a full copy (=deep) or a fast copy (=shallow) of a packet

syntax_6083.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6083.title: Packettype
syntax_6083.description: Return the packet type of a %packet%

en: Return the packet type of a %packet%

syntax_6084.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6084.title: ID of Entity
syntax_6084.description: Get the ID of an entity. This method return a number and not the UUID

en: Get the ID of an entity. This method return a number and not the UUID

syntax_6085.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6085.title: NMS Pair
syntax_6085.description: Pair object A with object B uning com.mojang.datafixers.util.Pair

en: Pair object A with object B uning com.mojang.datafixers.util.Pair

syntax_5335.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5335.title: On Packet Event - Skript-Packet
syntax_5335.description: Called when a packet of one of the specified types is being sent or received. You can optionally specify a priority triggers with higher priority will be called later (so high priority will come after low priority, and monitor priority will come last). By default, the priority is normal.

en: Called when a packet of one of the specified types is being sent or received. You can optionally specify a priority triggers with higher priority will be called later (so high priority will come after low priority, and monitor priority will come last). By default, the priority is normal.

syntax_6074.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6074.title: DataWatcher Index
syntax_6074.description: Get or set a datawatcher's index. Used for metadata packet. More informations here https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki/Data-Watcher

en: Get or set a datawatcher's index. Used for metadata packet. More informations here https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki/Data-Watcher

syntax_6077.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6077.title: NMS
syntax_6077.description:
Get the NMS (net.minecraft.server) from a convertible object or invert
More information here https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki/ExprNMS

en:
Get the NMS (net.minecraft.server) from a convertible object or invert
More information here https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki/ExprNMS
Convert a %number% to int/float/long/double/short/byte

syntax_11470.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11470.title: On Packet Event - Skript-Packet
syntax_11470.description: Called when a packet of one of the specified types is being sent or received.

en: Called when a packet of one of the specified types is being sent or received.

syntax_11471.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11471.title: Is Bukkit Material
syntax_11471.description: Check if a given object is an instance of org.bukkit.Material
syntax_11471.syntax_pattern:
%objects% (is|are) Bukkit Material
%objects% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) Bukkit Material

en: Check if a given object is an instance of org.bukkit.Material

syntax_11472.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11472.title: Is Java List
syntax_11472.description: Check if a given object is an instance of java.util.List
syntax_11472.syntax_pattern:
%objects% (is|are) Java List
%objects% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) Java List

en: Check if a given object is an instance of java.util.List

syntax_11473.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11473.title: Is MMS
syntax_11473.description: Check if a given object can be found within the package net.minecraft.server

en: Check if a given object can be found within the package net.minecraft.server

syntax_11474.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11474.title: Is from client
syntax_11474.description: Check if a given packet is sent by the client to the server
syntax_11474.syntax_pattern:
%packets% (is|are) from client
%packets% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) from client

en: Check if a given packet is sent by the client to the server

syntax_11475.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11475.title: Is from server
syntax_11475.description: Check if a given packet is sent by the server to the client
syntax_11475.syntax_pattern:
%packets% (is|are) from server
%packets% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) from server

en: Check if a given packet is sent by the server to the client

syntax_11476.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11476.title: Bukkit Material
syntax_11476.description: Get the Material of an item or block

en: Get the Material of an item or block

syntax_6076.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6076.title: DataWatcher
syntax_6076.description:
Create a new datawatcher. Used for metadata packet.
The data watcher is linked to the packet and you don't need to set the packet field to it
More information at https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki/Data-Watcher

en:
Create a new datawatcher. Used for metadata packet.
The data watcher is linked to the packet and you don't need to set the packet field to it
More information at https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki/Data-Watcher

syntax_6075.creator: Anarchick
syntax_6075.title: DataWatcher Indexes
syntax_6075.description: Get all indexes of a data watcher

en: Get all indexes of a data watcher

syntax_11477.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11477.title: Item from Material
syntax_11477.description: Get the ItemStack from a Material

en: Get the ItemStack from a Material

syntax_5343.creator: Anarchick
syntax_5343.title: Packet Field
syntax_5343.description:
Get or set a packet field
Field id start from 0 and increase by 1 for each existent field
This expression has an auto-converter. More information on the wiki https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki

en:
Get or set a packet field
Field id start from 0 and increase by 1 for each existent field
This expression has an auto-converter. More information on the wiki https://github.com/Anarchick/skript-packet/wiki

syntax_11478.creator: Anarchick
syntax_11478.title: Datawatcher
syntax_11478.description: A data watcher is a list of index (=integer) associate with a value (=object)

en: A data watcher is a list of index (=integer) associate with a value (=object)
Represents a packet from ProtocolLib
